title: CPO-CFO partnerships become central to AI investment decisions and workforce strategy
description: CPOs and CFOs who operate separately are leaving a costly gap as AI reshapes workforce decisions. Organizations that treat headcount, productivity, and AI investment as shared problems-not siloed ones-build more durable leadership.

title: VIDA Global files for NYSE American IPO to raise $15.8 million for its AI agent platform
description: Texas-based VIDA Global filed for a $15.8M IPO on NYSE American, offering shares at $4.50-$5.00. The company builds software for deploying AI agents that handle calls, scheduling, and customer support.

title: Arm Chips Set to Dominate 90% of AI Server Market by 2029
description: NewsGhana, Latest Updates and Breaking News of Ghana, Roger A. title: How to opt out of AI data collection in popular apps
description: Most AI platforms use your conversations to train their systems by default. Learn how to turn off data collection on ChatGPT, Google, Alexa and Siri.

title: Ethereum’s Vitalik Buterin Warns Against AI Agent Security Risks, Shares His Private LLM Stack
description: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has moved entirely off cloud AI services and detailed his fully local, sandboxed artificial intelligence (AI) setup in a blog post published this week. Key Takeaways: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin abandoned cloud AI in April 2026, running Qwen3.5:35B locally on an Nvidia 5090 laptop at 90 tokens per second. Buterin found [...]
